generated_oml:
instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ air volume) thermal incubator system"
    base:contains RoomTemperatureSensor, InternalBoxTemperatureSensor1, InternalBoxTemperatureSensor2, Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPiController, PCBDesign, PowerSupply, StyrofoamContainer
]

instance RoomTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring room temperature from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy (-10°C to +85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RoomTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalBoxTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal box temperature from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy (-10°C to +85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalBoxTemperature1DataTransmitted
]

instance InternalBoxTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal box temperature from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy (-10°C to +85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalBoxTemperature2DataTransmitted
]

instance RoomTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RoomTemperatureSensor
]

instance InternalBoxTemperature1DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalBoxTemperatureSensor1
]

instance InternalBoxTemperature2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalBoxTemperatureSensor2
]

instance RoomTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from room temperature sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RoomTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler, BangBangControlEnabler
]

instance InternalBoxTemperatureData1 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time internal box temperature data from sensor 1"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalBoxTemperature1DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler, BangBangControlEnabler
]

instance InternalBoxTemperatureData2 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time internal box temperature data from sensor 2"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalBoxTemperature2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler, BangBangControlEnabler
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic model for energy transfer between air and environment with 2 parameters, calibrated using non-linear least squares (Scipy)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationLibrary
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic model including heatbed thermal inertia with 4 parameters, calibrated using non-linear least squares (Scipy)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationLibrary
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for real-time data communication between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]

instance ScipyOptimizationLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy optimization library for non-linear least squares model calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance OneWireProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire communication protocol for connecting DS18S20 temperature sensors to Raspberry Pi GPIO"
    DTDFVocab:enables SensorDataAcquisitionService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based simulation engine using dynamic thermal models for real-time temperature simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperatureSimulationService
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for fault detection using temperature sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "State estimation service using dynamic models and sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance BangBangControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control algorithm for temperature regulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables BangBangControlService
]

instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data transmission from physical sensors to virtual components via RabbitMQ"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionInsight
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model calibration using non-linear least squares optimization with sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedModelInsight
]

instance SensorDataAcquisitionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Acquisition of temperature data via 1-Wire protocol from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:provides SensorDataAcquisitionInsight
]

instance TemperatureSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature simulation using calibrated dynamic models (Model A with 2 parameters, Model B with 4 parameters)"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureSimulationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time fault detection via monitoring temperature sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureViolationInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation for predictive control using dynamic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveControlInsight
]

instance BangBangControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control for temperature regulation based on state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationDecisionInsight, TemperatureControlAction
]

instance DataTransmissionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data transmission from physical sensors to virtual components via RabbitMQ"
]

instance CalibratedModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated dynamic models used for simulation and control"
]

instance SensorDataAcquisitionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Temperature data acquired via 1-Wire protocol from DS18S20 sensors"
]

instance TemperatureSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated temperature profiles for system prediction"
]

instance TemperatureViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety monitoring for temperature violations exceeding predefined thresholds"
]

instance PredictiveControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "State estimation for predictive control decisions"
]

instance OptimizationDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization decisions via the bang-bang controller for temperature regulation"
]

instance TemperatureControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Precise heating and cooling control via bang-bang strategy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "214×214×3 mm heatbed actuated via Raspberry Pi GPIO through MOSFETs (4A current handling) for heating control"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan with 0.02 m³/s airflow actuated via Raspberry Pi GPIO through MOSFETs and optocouplers for air circulation control"
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for managing sensors and actuators"
]

instance PCBDesign : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom PCB with MOSFETs (4A current handling) and optocouplers for signal isolation and actuator control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for heatbed and fan operation"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed adjustments) generated by the DT controller are transmitted via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which executes them through the PCB's MOSFETs and optocouplers."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ-based communication architecture where controller, low-level driver, and simulation models interact through message passing, forming a cohesive system for DT operations."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated'), where models are integrated post-deployment for ongoing monitoring and control of the physical incubator."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models validated against experimental data; Model B's four-parameter version better predicts thermal inertia, with calibration minimizing residual error via Scipy's optimizer."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ AMQP protocol over Ethernet/Wi-Fi (Raspberry Pi's built-in networking) for inter-component communication."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "On-premises deployment on Raspberry Pi 4 hardware."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol incorporated into low-level driver to maintain device safety; optocouplers provide electrical isolation between control signals and high-current components."
]
